records.m_Talk_ENG: Stop the Administration's dogs from escaping!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Stop the Administration's dogs from escaping!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Stop the Administration's dogs from escaping!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Kill them if they try to escape the perimeter without surrendering!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Kill them if they try to escape the perimeter without surrendering!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Kill them if they try to escape the perimeter without surrendering!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ugh, it just doesn't end. When I think I have a chance to push through, more just keep coming.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ugh, it just doesn't end. When I think I have a chance to push through, more just keep coming.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ugh, it just doesn't end. When I think I have a chance to push through, more just keep coming.

records.m_Talk_ENG: They even brought armored units to catch a few Counters?
records.m_Talk_DEU: They even brought armored units to catch a few Counters?
records.m_Talk_FRA: They even brought armored units to catch a few Counters?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'll handle the drones and tanks.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'll handle the drones and tanks.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'll handle the drones and tanks.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'll push back the assault force. Miss Brecht, you should protect the Administrator.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'll push back the assault force. Miss Brecht, you should protect the Administrator.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'll push back the assault force. Miss Brecht, you should protect the Administrator.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Leave it to me.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Leave it to me.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Leave it to me.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What are you doing here? I never requested for backup.
records.m_Talk_DEU: What are you doing here? I never requested for backup.
records.m_Talk_FRA: What are you doing here? I never requested for backup.

records.m_Talk_ENG: There were orders from Minister Ivanov for us to help with the operation and secure the Artifacts.
records.m_Talk_DEU: There were orders from Minister Ivanov for us to help with the operation and secure the Artifacts.
records.m_Talk_FRA: There were orders from Minister Ivanov for us to help with the operation and secure the Artifacts.

records.m_Talk_ENG: He also urged to capture all Administration personnel alive.
records.m_Talk_DEU: He also urged to capture all Administration personnel alive.
records.m_Talk_FRA: He also urged to capture all Administration personnel alive.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I've picked up a Qlipha energy signal from the Well.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I've picked up a Qlipha energy signal from the Well.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I've picked up a Qlipha energy signal from the Well.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Now that we have the coordinates, we can connect the Fishing Rod.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Now that we have the coordinates, we can connect the Fishing Rod.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Now that we have the coordinates, we can connect the Fishing Rod.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Really? That's good news.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Really? That's good news.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Really? That's good news.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It seems that the prisoner got the job done.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It seems that the prisoner got the job done.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It seems that the prisoner got the job done.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But the space around the coordinates is... extremely unstable due to the Corruption ray.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But the space around the coordinates is... extremely unstable due to the Corruption ray.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But the space around the coordinates is... extremely unstable due to the Corruption ray.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'll connect the Fishing Rod to a point where the Corruption ray is weak to prompt an escape, so give me a little more time.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'll connect the Fishing Rod to a point where the Corruption ray is weak to prompt an escape, so give me a little more time.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'll connect the Fishing Rod to a point where the Corruption ray is weak to prompt an escape, so give me a little more time.

records.m_Talk_ENG: *Huff* *Huff*
records.m_Talk_DEU: *Huff* *Huff*
records.m_Talk_FRA: *Huff* *Huff*

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's going to catch up to me.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's going to catch up to me.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's going to catch up to me.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Even if it's just for a second... if I can stop it from moving...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Even if it's just for a second... if I can stop it from moving...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Even if it's just for a second... if I can stop it from moving...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: It broke free... so easily.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It broke free... so easily.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It broke free... so easily.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I guess... it's because she used to use the same ability.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I guess... it's because she used to use the same ability.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I guess... it's because she used to use the same ability.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ngh?! What's it trying to shoot?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ngh?! What's it trying to shoot?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ngh?! What's it trying to shoot?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, no...! There's no place to hide!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, no...! There's no place to hide!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, no...! There's no place to hide!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Aiming plasma cannons.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Aiming plasma cannons.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Aiming plasma cannons.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Stopping the <color=#ffd34c>Hollow God</color>'s attack by utilizing all the ship's available emergency energy.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Stopping the <color=#ffd34c>Hollow God</color>'s attack by utilizing all the ship's available emergency energy.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Stopping the <color=#ffd34c>Hollow God</color>'s attack by utilizing all the ship's available emergency energy.

records.m_Talk_ENG: With this... the ship has completed... its mission...
records.m_Talk_DEU: With this... the ship has completed... its mission...
records.m_Talk_FRA: With this... the ship has completed... its mission...

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's down...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's down...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's down...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I need to get away now!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I need to get away now!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I need to get away now!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Where am I...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Where am I...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Where am I...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Am I... in hell?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Am I... in hell?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Am I... in hell?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Help...! There are C.O.s everywhere!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Help...! There are C.O.s everywhere!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Help...! There are C.O.s everywhere!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Why isn't the Administration coming to help? Did they abandon us?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Why isn't the Administration coming to help? Did they abandon us?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Why isn't the Administration coming to help? Did they abandon us?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I see.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I see.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I see.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I abandoned their hopes and left.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I abandoned their hopes and left.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I abandoned their hopes and left.

records.m_Talk_ENG: We fought together, but... we weren't together in the end.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We fought together, but... we weren't together in the end.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We fought together, but... we weren't together in the end.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Using <color=#ffd34c>"next time"</color> as an excuse... I let everything turn to ashes.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Using <color=#ffd34c>"next time"</color> as an excuse... I let everything turn to ashes.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Using <color=#ffd34c>"next time"</color> as an excuse... I let everything turn to ashes.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Are you saying there is nothing we can do? But we're the Administration!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Are you saying there is nothing we can do? But we're the Administration!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Are you saying there is nothing we can do? But we're the Administration!

records.m_Talk_ENG: We lost most of our units. Aside from you and me, everyone else is severely injured.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We lost most of our units. Aside from you and me, everyone else is severely injured.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We lost most of our units. Aside from you and me, everyone else is severely injured.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But I can't lose you too, just to prevent what was predetermined to happen!
records.m_Talk_DEU: But I can't lose you too, just to prevent what was predetermined to happen!
records.m_Talk_FRA: But I can't lose you too, just to prevent what was predetermined to happen!

records.m_Talk_ENG: But... but...
records.m_Talk_DEU: But... but...
records.m_Talk_FRA: But... but...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Have I not made it clear?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Have I not made it clear?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Have I not made it clear?

records.m_Talk_ENG: The moment we lost the Qliphoth Game, this world's apocalypse was decided.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The moment we lost the Qliphoth Game, this world's apocalypse was decided.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The moment we lost the Qliphoth Game, this world's apocalypse was decided.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...We knew.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...We knew.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...We knew.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That even if we failed... the progress we made wouldn't be for nothing.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That even if we failed... the progress we made wouldn't be for nothing.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That even if we failed... the progress we made wouldn't be for nothing.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Master, look at this.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Master, look at this.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Master, look at this.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What did you bring this time? It's almost time to start training.
records.m_Talk_DEU: What did you bring this time? It's almost time to start training.
records.m_Talk_FRA: What did you bring this time? It's almost time to start training.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What do you think? Isn't it massive?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What do you think? Isn't it massive?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What do you think? Isn't it massive?

records.m_Talk_ENG: When I told them that you were visiting, the nurses and children made this bouquet to express their gratitude.
records.m_Talk_DEU: When I told them that you were visiting, the nurses and children made this bouquet to express their gratitude.
records.m_Talk_FRA: When I told them that you were visiting, the nurses and children made this bouquet to express their gratitude.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It will wither away soon. Why are they wasting their time and energy?
records.m_Talk_DEU: It will wither away soon. Why are they wasting their time and energy?
records.m_Talk_FRA: It will wither away soon. Why are they wasting their time and energy?

records.m_Talk_ENG: You take care of it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You take care of it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You take care of it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ughh. They worked hard to make it! You could at least go and say thank you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ughh. They worked hard to make it! You could at least go and say thank you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ughh. They worked hard to make it! You could at least go and say thank you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You're such a heartless person, Master!
records.m_Talk_DEU: You're such a heartless person, Master!
records.m_Talk_FRA: You're such a heartless person, Master!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Shut it. You're going to have special training today.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Shut it. You're going to have special training today.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Shut it. You're going to have special training today.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I tried not to get caught up in the process as much as possible.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I tried not to get caught up in the process as much as possible.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I tried not to get caught up in the process as much as possible.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Because no matter what sacrifices were made, if Tammiel could not be defeated... then there will be nothing left.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Because no matter what sacrifices were made, if Tammiel could not be defeated... then there will be nothing left.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Because no matter what sacrifices were made, if Tammiel could not be defeated... then there will be nothing left.

records.m_Talk_ENG: *Sob* *Sniffle*
records.m_Talk_DEU: *Sob* *Sniffle*
records.m_Talk_FRA: *Sob* *Sniffle*

records.m_Talk_ENG: She was a good little sister. So, I'm sure she went to a better place.
records.m_Talk_DEU: She was a good little sister. So, I'm sure she went to a better place.
records.m_Talk_FRA: She was a good little sister. So, I'm sure she went to a better place.

records.m_Talk_ENG: She will be resting in a warm flower garden without Corruption or pain.
records.m_Talk_DEU: She will be resting in a warm flower garden without Corruption or pain.
records.m_Talk_FRA: She will be resting in a warm flower garden without Corruption or pain.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yes... I'm sure she will.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yes... I'm sure she will.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yes... I'm sure she will.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Thank you for staying with me, Miss Pavlin.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Thank you for staying with me, Miss Pavlin.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Thank you for staying with me, Miss Pavlin.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's a hard time for all of us... so we must stick together.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's a hard time for all of us... so we must stick together.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's a hard time for all of us... so we must stick together.

records.m_Talk_ENG: We can't send off the children alone, can we?
records.m_Talk_DEU: We can't send off the children alone, can we?
records.m_Talk_FRA: We can't send off the children alone, can we?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Master?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Master?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Master?

records.m_Talk_ENG: That flower...
records.m_Talk_DEU: That flower...
records.m_Talk_FRA: That flower...

records.m_Talk_ENG: The bouquet... The flower was called Calendula.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The bouquet... The flower was called Calendula.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The bouquet... The flower was called Calendula.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It took me some time to find them due to the sudden spread of Corruption over these past few months.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It took me some time to find them due to the sudden spread of Corruption over these past few months.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It took me some time to find them due to the sudden spread of Corruption over these past few months.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ha ha, I appreciate your efforts. They are still pretty as ever.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ha ha, I appreciate your efforts. They are still pretty as ever.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ha ha, I appreciate your efforts. They are still pretty as ever.

records.m_Talk_ENG: We may not see this flower in the near future, but I'm sure they will be in full bloom in places where the children play.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We may not see this flower in the near future, but I'm sure they will be in full bloom in places where the children play.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We may not see this flower in the near future, but I'm sure they will be in full bloom in places where the children play.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Thank you, everyone.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Thank you, everyone.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Thank you, everyone.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Thank you all... for being here with me.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Thank you all... for being here with me.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Thank you all... for being here with me.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The Corruption and the apocalypse.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The Corruption and the apocalypse.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The Corruption and the apocalypse.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Everything stems from our original sin.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Everything stems from our original sin.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Everything stems from our original sin.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Tammiel... She is the root of all this...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Tammiel... She is the root of all this...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Tammiel... She is the root of all this...

records.m_Talk_ENG: We must settle this matter with our own hands.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We must settle this matter with our own hands.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We must settle this matter with our own hands.

records.m_Talk_ENG: No matter the sacrifice.
records.m_Talk_DEU: No matter the sacrifice.
records.m_Talk_FRA: No matter the sacrifice.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What was that just now? Did a star fall from the sky?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What was that just now? Did a star fall from the sky?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What was that just now? Did a star fall from the sky?

records.m_Talk_ENG: That ray of light... It's the same one I saw at the graveyard that day...
records.m_Talk_DEU: That ray of light... It's the same one I saw at the graveyard that day...
records.m_Talk_FRA: That ray of light... It's the same one I saw at the graveyard that day...

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's it...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's it...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's it...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: We need to head to that light! Then, we can get out of here!
records.m_Talk_DEU: We need to head to that light! Then, we can get out of here!
records.m_Talk_FRA: We need to head to that light! Then, we can get out of here!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Huh...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Huh...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Huh...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Parry? You were alive?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Parry? You were alive?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Parry? You were alive?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Of course, I'm alive! Do I look like a ghost to you?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Of course, I'm alive! Do I look like a ghost to you?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Of course, I'm alive! Do I look like a ghost to you?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Well... I can see how it would be easy to confuse me for one with how I look right now.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Well... I can see how it would be easy to confuse me for one with how I look right now.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Well... I can see how it would be easy to confuse me for one with how I look right now.

records.m_Talk_ENG: *Sob* I... thought you died... because of me...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: *Sob* I... thought you died... because of me...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: *Sob* I... thought you died... because of me...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hey, hey! You're running the wrong way!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hey, hey! You're running the wrong way!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hey, hey! You're running the wrong way!

records.m_Talk_ENG: And I told you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And I told you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And I told you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm not going to die.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm not going to die.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm not going to die.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I thought... *Sniffle* you were lying.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I thought... *Sniffle* you were lying.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I thought... *Sniffle* you were lying.

records.m_Talk_ENG: We can talk about it after we get out of here.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We can talk about it after we get out of here.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We can talk about it after we get out of here.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Come on! Let's go!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Come on! Let's go!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Come on! Let's go!

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Okay!
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Okay!
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Okay!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Stop the Administration's dogs from escaping!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Stop the Administration's dogs from escaping!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Stop the Administration's dogs from escaping!

root.m_Talk_FRA: It's down...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: I need to get away now!
root.m_Talk_DEU: I need to get away now!
root.m_Talk_FRA: I need to get away now!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Where am I...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Where am I...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Where am I...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Am I... in hell?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Am I... in hell?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Am I... in hell?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Help...! There are C.O.s everywhere!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Help...! There are C.O.s everywhere!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Help...! There are C.O.s everywhere!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Why isn't the Administration coming to help? Did they abandon us?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Why isn't the Administration coming to help? Did they abandon us?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Why isn't the Administration coming to help? Did they abandon us?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I see.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I see.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I see.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I abandoned their hopes and left.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I abandoned their hopes and left.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I abandoned their hopes and left.

root.m_Talk_ENG: We fought together, but... we weren't together in the end.
root.m_Talk_DEU: We fought together, but... we weren't together in the end.
root.m_Talk_FRA: We fought together, but... we weren't together in the end.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Using <color=#ffd34c>"next time"</color> as an excuse... I let everything turn to ashes.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Using <color=#ffd34c>"next time"</color> as an excuse... I let everything turn to ashes.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Using <color=#ffd34c>"next time"</color> as an excuse... I let everything turn to ashes.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Are you saying there is nothing we can do? But we're the Administration!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Are you saying there is nothing we can do? But we're the Administration!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Are you saying there is nothing we can do? But we're the Administration!

root.m_Talk_ENG: We lost most of our units. Aside from you and me, everyone else is severely injured.
root.m_Talk_DEU: We lost most of our units. Aside from you and me, everyone else is severely injured.
root.m_Talk_FRA: We lost most of our units. Aside from you and me, everyone else is severely injured.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But I can't lose you too, just to prevent what was predetermined to happen!
root.m_Talk_DEU: But I can't lose you too, just to prevent what was predetermined to happen!
root.m_Talk_FRA: But I can't lose you too, just to prevent what was predetermined to happen!

root.m_Talk_ENG: But... but...
root.m_Talk_DEU: But... but...
root.m_Talk_FRA: But... but...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Have I not made it clear?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Have I not made it clear?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Have I not made it clear?

root.m_Talk_ENG: The moment we lost the Qliphoth Game, this world's apocalypse was decided.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The moment we lost the Qliphoth Game, this world's apocalypse was decided.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The moment we lost the Qliphoth Game, this world's apocalypse was decided.

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...We knew.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...We knew.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...We knew.

root.m_Talk_ENG: That even if we failed... the progress we made wouldn't be for nothing.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That even if we failed... the progress we made wouldn't be for nothing.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That even if we failed... the progress we made wouldn't be for nothing.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Master, look at this.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Master, look at this.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Master, look at this.

root.m_Talk_ENG: What did you bring this time? It's almost time to start training.
root.m_Talk_DEU: What did you bring this time? It's almost time to start training.
root.m_Talk_FRA: What did you bring this time? It's almost time to start training.

root.m_Talk_ENG: What do you think? Isn't it massive?
root.m_Talk_DEU: What do you think? Isn't it massive?
root.m_Talk_FRA: What do you think? Isn't it massive?

root.m_Talk_ENG: When I told them that you were visiting, the nurses and children made this bouquet to express their gratitude.
root.m_Talk_DEU: When I told them that you were visiting, the nurses and children made this bouquet to express their gratitude.
root.m_Talk_FRA: When I told them that you were visiting, the nurses and children made this bouquet to express their gratitude.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It will wither away soon. Why are they wasting their time and energy?
root.m_Talk_DEU: It will wither away soon. Why are they wasting their time and energy?
root.m_Talk_FRA: It will wither away soon. Why are they wasting their time and energy?

root.m_Talk_ENG: You take care of it.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You take care of it.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You take care of it.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ughh. They worked hard to make it! You could at least go and say thank you.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ughh. They worked hard to make it! You could at least go and say thank you.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ughh. They worked hard to make it! You could at least go and say thank you.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You're such a heartless person, Master!
root.m_Talk_DEU: You're such a heartless person, Master!
root.m_Talk_FRA: You're such a heartless person, Master!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Shut it. You're going to have special training today.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Shut it. You're going to have special training today.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Shut it. You're going to have special training today.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I tried not to get caught up in the process as much as possible.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I tried not to get caught up in the process as much as possible.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I tried not to get caught up in the process as much as possible.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Because no matter what sacrifices were made, if Tammiel could not be defeated... then there will be nothing left.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Because no matter what sacrifices were made, if Tammiel could not be defeated... then there will be nothing left.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Because no matter what sacrifices were made, if Tammiel could not be defeated... then there will be nothing left.

root.m_Talk_ENG: *Sob* *Sniffle*
root.m_Talk_DEU: *Sob* *Sniffle*
root.m_Talk_FRA: *Sob* *Sniffle*

root.m_Talk_ENG: She was a good little sister. So, I'm sure she went to a better place.
root.m_Talk_DEU: She was a good little sister. So, I'm sure she went to a better place.
root.m_Talk_FRA: She was a good little sister. So, I'm sure she went to a better place.

root.m_Talk_ENG: She will be resting in a warm flower garden without Corruption or pain.
root.m_Talk_DEU: She will be resting in a warm flower garden without Corruption or pain.
root.m_Talk_FRA: She will be resting in a warm flower garden without Corruption or pain.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yes... I'm sure she will.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yes... I'm sure she will.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yes... I'm sure she will.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Thank you for staying with me, Miss Pavlin.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Thank you for staying with me, Miss Pavlin.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Thank you for staying with me, Miss Pavlin.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's a hard time for all of us... so we must stick together.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's a hard time for all of us... so we must stick together.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's a hard time for all of us... so we must stick together.

root.m_Talk_ENG: We can't send off the children alone, can we?
root.m_Talk_DEU: We can't send off the children alone, can we?
root.m_Talk_FRA: We can't send off the children alone, can we?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Master?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Master?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Master?

root.m_Talk_ENG: That flower...
root.m_Talk_DEU: That flower...
root.m_Talk_FRA: That flower...

root.m_Talk_ENG: The bouquet... The flower was called Calendula.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The bouquet... The flower was called Calendula.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The bouquet... The flower was called Calendula.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It took me some time to find them due to the sudden spread of Corruption over these past few months.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It took me some time to find them due to the sudden spread of Corruption over these past few months.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It took me some time to find them due to the sudden spread of Corruption over these past few months.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ha ha, I appreciate your efforts. They are still pretty as ever.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ha ha, I appreciate your efforts. They are still pretty as ever.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ha ha, I appreciate your efforts. They are still pretty as ever.

root.m_Talk_ENG: We may not see this flower in the near future, but I'm sure they will be in full bloom in places where the children play.
root.m_Talk_DEU: We may not see this flower in the near future, but I'm sure they will be in full bloom in places where the children play.
root.m_Talk_FRA: We may not see this flower in the near future, but I'm sure they will be in full bloom in places where the children play.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Thank you, everyone.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Thank you, everyone.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Thank you, everyone.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Thank you all... for being here with me.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Thank you all... for being here with me.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Thank you all... for being here with me.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The Corruption and the apocalypse.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The Corruption and the apocalypse.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The Corruption and the apocalypse.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Everything stems from our original sin.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Everything stems from our original sin.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Everything stems from our original sin.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Tammiel... She is the root of all this...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Tammiel... She is the root of all this...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Tammiel... She is the root of all this...

root.m_Talk_ENG: We must settle this matter with our own hands.
root.m_Talk_DEU: We must settle this matter with our own hands.
root.m_Talk_FRA: We must settle this matter with our own hands.

root.m_Talk_ENG: No matter the sacrifice.
root.m_Talk_DEU: No matter the sacrifice.
root.m_Talk_FRA: No matter the sacrifice.

root.m_Talk_ENG: What was that just now? Did a star fall from the sky?
root.m_Talk_DEU: What was that just now? Did a star fall from the sky?
root.m_Talk_FRA: What was that just now? Did a star fall from the sky?

root.m_Talk_ENG: That ray of light... It's the same one I saw at the graveyard that day...
root.m_Talk_DEU: That ray of light... It's the same one I saw at the graveyard that day...
root.m_Talk_FRA: That ray of light... It's the same one I saw at the graveyard that day...

root.m_Talk_ENG: That's it...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: That's it...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: That's it...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: We need to head to that light! Then, we can get out of here!
root.m_Talk_DEU: We need to head to that light! Then, we can get out of here!
root.m_Talk_FRA: We need to head to that light! Then, we can get out of here!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Huh...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Huh...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Huh...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Parry? You were alive?!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Parry? You were alive?!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Parry? You were alive?!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Of course, I'm alive! Do I look like a ghost to you?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Of course, I'm alive! Do I look like a ghost to you?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Of course, I'm alive! Do I look like a ghost to you?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Well... I can see how it would be easy to confuse me for one with how I look right now.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Well... I can see how it would be easy to confuse me for one with how I look right now.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Well... I can see how it would be easy to confuse me for one with how I look right now.

root.m_Talk_ENG: *Sob* I... thought you died... because of me...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: *Sob* I... thought you died... because of me...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: *Sob* I... thought you died... because of me...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hey, hey! You're running the wrong way!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hey, hey! You're running the wrong way!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hey, hey! You're running the wrong way!

root.m_Talk_ENG: And I told you.
root.m_Talk_DEU: And I told you.
root.m_Talk_FRA: And I told you.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'm not going to die.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'm not going to die.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'm not going to die.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I thought... *Sniffle* you were lying.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I thought... *Sniffle* you were lying.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I thought... *Sniffle* you were lying.

root.m_Talk_ENG: We can talk about it after we get out of here.
root.m_Talk_DEU: We can talk about it after we get out of here.
root.m_Talk_FRA: We can talk about it after we get out of here.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Come on! Let's go!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Come on! Let's go!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Come on! Let's go!

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Okay!
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Okay!
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Okay!
